title: pseudodrynaria coronans
intro: Pseudodrynaria coronans, also known as the "Crown-of-Thorns," is a species of flowering plant in the family Staphylopidaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pseudodrynaria coronans include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tea or decoction, or applied topically to the skin as a paste or ointment.
